result.stdout:
Usage: squeal [command] [options]

Options:
  --help                            Show help information.
  --path <path>                     The base path (defaults to current dir)
  --connection-string <connString>  The connection string. Overrides squeal.json
  --aad-tenant-id <tenantId>        The Azure AD Tenant (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json
  --aad-client-id <clientId>        The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json
  --aad-client-secret <secret>      The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json

Commands:
  run                               Runs a named script against the target
                                    database.
  up                                Runs database migrations against the target
                                    database.

Run 'squeal [command] --help' for more information about a command.

Commands:

result.stdout:
Runs a named script against the target database.

Usage: squeal run [options]

Options:
  --help                            Show help information.
  -s|--script                       The name of the script to run
  -p|--parameter                    Pass a parameter to the script. Format:
                                    PARAM=VALUE, Replaces ${PARAM} in the
                                    script.
  --path <path>                     The base path (defaults to current dir)
  --connection-string <connString>  The connection string. Overrides squeal.json
  --aad-tenant-id <tenantId>        The Azure AD Tenant (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json
  --aad-client-id <clientId>        The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json
  --aad-client-secret <secret>      The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json

result.stdout:
Runs database migrations against the target database.

Usage: squeal up [options]

Options:
  --help                            Show help information.
  -m|--target-migration             The migration ID to update/rollback the
                                    database to
  --path <path>                     The base path (defaults to current dir)
  --connection-string <connString>  The connection string. Overrides squeal.json
  --aad-tenant-id <tenantId>        The Azure AD Tenant (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json
  --aad-client-id <clientId>        The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json
  --aad-client-secret <secret>      The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
                                    Principal authentication). Overrides
                                    squeal.json
